top_3.treatment: The diseased twigs should be pruned and burnt along with fallen leaves. Spraying twice with Carbendazim (Bavistin 0.1%) at 15 days interval during flowering controls blossom infection.
Pruning of affected branches and their prompt destruction followed by spraying of Wettasulf (0.2%) helps to control the disease.
No treatment needed. Maintain good agricultural practices.
